description_long: This object is a compact, black rifle with a minimalist design, featuring a tubular receiver and a long, slender barrel. The stock is a simple, skeletonized wireframe loop, likely made of metal, providing lightweight support. The pistol grip is integrated into the lower receiver, and a detachable box magazine is visible beneath the action. The rifle has basic iron sights mounted along the top, with no visible optics or advanced sighting systems. The muzzle is plain, with no additional device such as a flash hider or suppressor attached. The overall finish is matte black, giving it a utilitarian and tactical appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black rifle with a wireframe stock, long barrel, and detachable box magazine, featuring basic iron sights and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wireframe stock, pistol grip, magazine, and long barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the receiver, magazine, and the wireframe stock from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wireframe stock and the back of the receiver.
